description: A winter landscape painting in bold, saturated colors. Snow-covered rolling hills dominate the background in warm yellow-whites and ochres. A line of dark evergreen trees (spruce or pine) crosses the middle ground. In the foreground, a small brown wooden cabin or barn sits in the snow. The river is implied by the flat snow-covered terrain. The sky shows a strip of blue. The brushwork is thick and confident, characteristic of the Canadian Group of Seven style, with strong color contrasts between the warm snow tones and dark tree silhouettes.
